use_cases: Display user profile pictures in dashboards and user management interfaces
Show user avatars with online/offline status indicators in chat applications
Provide fallback initials or text when avatar images fail to load
Render user identity elements in social and collaboration platforms
Display reviewer or author information in content-heavy applications
ai_summary: A shadcn/radix-based avatar component system with image, fallback, indicator, and status sub-components. Features status variants (online, offline, busy, away) with colored indicators. Built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling, providing a flexible and accessible user identity display for dashboards, chat apps, and social platforms.
